Principal's Message

Mr. Qasim Ali

Principal, OIT Mandi Bahauddin

"

Technical education is the backbone of a progressive nation — it transforms potential into purpose and skills into success. In an era where industry demands practical excellence, we are proud to offer world-class technical training that prepares our students not just for jobs, but for leadership.

At our institution, we don't just teach — we inspire, innovate, and empower. Every student who walks through our doors is given the tools to build a brighter future for themselves and their community.

I cordially invite talented and ambitious students to join our family. Your journey towards a skilled, successful, and impactful career begins here.

QA

Mr. Qasim Ali

Principal & Director, OIT

">
